question: प्रत्येक राज्य के भीतर जिलों को प्रति घर 0 से 14 वर्ष के बच्चों की औसत संख्या के आधार पर उच्चतम से निम्नतम क्रम में रैंक करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    g.STATE,
    g.DISTRICT,
    AVG(fhc.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) AS avg_children_per_household,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY g.STATE ORDER BY AVG(fhc.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) DESC) AS district_rank_within_state
FROM 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY g
    INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION fhc ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = fhc.GEOGRAPHY_ID
GROUP BY 
    g.STATE, g.DISTRICT
ORDER BY 
    g.STATE, district_rank_within_state;

    g.STATE,
    g.DISTRICT,
    AVG(fhc.HOUSEHOLD_CHILDREN_0_TO_14_COUNT) AS avg_children_per_household,

    DIM_GEOGRAPHY g

WHERE sm.IS_REINTERVIEW_HOUSEHOLD = 'Yes'
AND hc.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT >= 3
ORDER BY g.GEOGRAPHY_ID;

    fhc.HOUSEHOLD_ID,

WHERE dg.STATE ILIKE 'Rajasthan'

question:

SELECT DISTINCT g.STATE, g.DISTRICT
FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION hhc

WHERE se.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY ILIKE 'Brahmin' OR se.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = 21
ORDER BY g.STATE;

question:
इस प्रश्न का अनुवाद करें:
उत्तर प्रदेश के शीर्ष 5 ग्रामीण जिलों की पहचान करें जहाँ औसत परिवार का आकार सबसे अधिक है, केवल उन जिलों पर विचार करते हुए जहाँ एक से अधिक दर्ज परिवार हैं।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIOECONOMIC AS T3 ON T2.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID = T3.SOCIOECONOMIC_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Uttar Pradesh' AND T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    g.DISTRICT,
    AVG(fhc.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) as avg_household_size
FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION fhc
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON fhc.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE g.STATE ILIKE 'Uttar Pradesh'
    AND g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG ILIKE 'Rural'
GROUP BY g.DISTRICT
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT fhc.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 1
ORDER BY avg_household_size DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    g.DISTRICT,
    AVG(fhc.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) as avg_household_size
FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION fhc
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON fhc.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE g.STATE ILIKE 'Uttar Pradesh'
    AND g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG ILIKE 'Rural'
GROUP BY g.DISTRICT
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT fhc.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 1
ORDER BY avg_household_size DESC
LIMIT 5;

question:
इस प्रश्न का अनुवाद करें:
गरीबी रेखा से ऊपर रहने वाले घरों वाले ग्रामीण जिलों की पहचान करें, उन शहरी जिलों को छोड़कर जिनमें गरीबी रेखा से ऊपर रहने वाले घर भी हैं।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 EXCEPT SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No';
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.STATE, g.DISTRICT
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g
JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION hhc ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = hhc.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS hpm ON hhc.HOUSEHOLD_ID = hpm.HOUSEHOLD_ID
WHERE hpm.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No'
AND g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural'
AND g.DISTRICT NOT IN (
    SELECT g2.DISTRICT

    JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS hpm2 ON hhc2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = hpm2.HOUSEHOLD_ID
    WHERE hpm2.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No'
    AND g2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban'
);
